'''Nerrowr''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who, along with the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] [[Nesha]], [[Besha]], and [[Kesha]], once worked for [[Riboga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

{{Char-stub}}
